title: Bug: oRPC TanStack Query client sends incorrect request format
description:
QA discovered that the oRPC TanStack Query client is not sending requests in the expected format. Direct API calls work: `curl -H 'Cookie: ...' --data '{"json":{}}' http://localhost:3000/v1/calendars/list` returns correct data. But TanStack Query integration fails with 'Error loading calendars'. Investigation needed:
1. Verify the `method: () => 'POST'` fix is being applied
2. Check if the body format `{json: ...}` is being sent correctly
3. Check if there's a GET vs POST issue in how queries are dispatched
4. May need to configure oRPC server to accept GET requests for queries

title: Blocked time management UI
description: New route apps/admin-ui/src/routes/calendars/$calendarId/blocked-time.tsx: List blocked time periods, Create with start datetime, end datetime, optional recurring rule, Delete blocked time.
